List commands/checks and results.

# commands and outputs here

- [ ] No secrets or credentials added

## 🔄 Backward Compatibility

- [ ] No breaking changes

## 📎 Related Issues

Link issues here (example: `Closes #123`).

## 📋 Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Scope is clear and focused
- [ ] Behavior matches issue/requirements
- [ ] Risks and impacts are documented
